courses.description: Explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping modern warfare, intelligence operations, and global power dynamics. From autonomous weapons systems to AI-driven cyber operations, this course examines the strategic, legal, and ethical dimensions of AI in national security — and what these developments mean for international stability.

courses.description: Agentic AI systems introduce a new class of vulnerabilities that most pentesters have not been trained to find. This course covers the full attack surface of modern AI agents — goal hijacking, tool-surface attacks, memory poisoning, multi-agent trust failures, and sandbox escape — and teaches practitioners how to scope, execute, and report agent pentests so AI/ML teams can remediate root causes.
